tree.name: Corey Kispert
tree.narrative: **Corey Kispert** came to Atlanta alongside **CJ McCollum** in the blockbuster **Trae Young** trade to Washington in January 2026. The Gonzaga sharpshooter gives the Hawks a career 40% three-point shooter, and his chain traces all the way back to the iconic Luka-Trae draft-night swap of 2018.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks acquire CJ McCollum and Corey Kispert for Trae Young

assetsGivenUp.name: Trae Young
assetsGivenUp.narrative: **Trae Young** was the Hawks' franchise player for seven seasons — a 3x All-Star who led Atlanta's 2021 ECF run. Acquired in the 2018 draft-night swap that sent **Luka Dončić** to Dallas, Young was eventually traded to Washington in January 2026 for McCollum and Kispert.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Draft night swap: Hawks selected Luka Doncic #3, traded him to Dallas for the #5 pick (Trae Young) and a 2019 protected 1st rounder

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 1st Round Pick (#3)
assetsGivenUp.narrative: Atlanta's own #3 pick in 2018 — used to draft **Luka Dončić**, then immediately shipped to Dallas for the #5 pick that became **Trae Young**.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hawks selected Doncic #3 overall, immediately traded to Dallas in swap for #5 pick (Trae Young)
assetsGivenUp.note: Slovenian prodigy, became 5x All-Star with Mavericks
